top_videos.text:
8 new places in Pittsburgh 🎉
🌊 standing wave coffee opening their second location in lawrenceville 
🍽️ the Eastman is coming to north side
🥭 @mangomangodessertusa is opening in cranberry
🐓 cockys coop is open in market square 
🥯 3 bro
top_videos.author: courtneyncamp

top_videos.text: This place is going in my new top coffee shop list!! Stay tuned for a full favorites list soon! I recommend the iced maple breve (half sweet) and Birmingham sammie at Standing Wave Coffee Roasters in Southside (Pittsburgh), PA! This place i
top_videos.author: mcmonaglle

top_videos.text:
Standing Wave Coffee’s newest location in Lawrenceville is my new go-to. Tried their house-made matcha latte.. so good! 

#pittsburghcoffeeshop #pittsburghmatcha #standingwavecoffee #pittsburgh
